vendor.seller_intro: Join our marketplace and start selling your products today. We provide the tools and support to grow your business.
vendor.store_name_hint: Choose a unique name that represents your business.
vendor.store_description_placeholder: Describe your store and the type of products you'll sell...
vendor.store_description_hint: A clear description helps customers understand your store.
vendor.store_logo_hint: Upload a professional logo for your store (PNG or JPG).
vendor.verification_document_hint: Upload a copy of your business license, national ID, or passport. A business license is preferred for faster approval. (PDF, JPG, or PNG)
vendor.phone_number_hint: A phone number we can reach you on.
vendor.registration_success: Application submitted successfully! Our team will review your details and respond within 24-48 hours.
vendor.already_registered: You already have a registered store.
vendor.application_submitted_desc: Thank you for your interest in joining our marketplace. Our review team will examine your details and documents. You'll receive an email notification once a decision is made.
vendor.benefit_1_desc: Showcase your products to thousands of customers worldwide.
vendor.benefit_2_desc: Comprehensive dashboard to manage products, orders, and revenue.
vendor.benefit_3_desc: Dedicated support team to help you every step of the way.
